meaning: vt.使...坠毁,撞击vi.飞机坠毁n.撞击,轰炸
examples: One of the boys has been careless enough to prang up his girl friend.
Darling, now do not get angry with me but I had a bit of a prang with a truck today.
When the first Prang raids came from the northwestern area of Fal, the Maro of Rhew was formed as a safe haven from these terrible raiders traveling on winged beasts.
But when all was said and done, Jeffrey Prang, a city councilmember from West Hollywood, thought the very fact that the forum took place represented real progress for the gay and lesbian community.
